caption: The video begins with a title card featuring the text "Alumni Spotlight" and the name "Kristine Johnson (MA Alum)" prominently displayed. The background is a deep purple hue, with a faint image of a person's face partially visible behind the text. Below the main title, there is a logo for the Mercatus Center at George Mason University, along with the words "Academic & Student Programs." This introductory sequence sets the stage for highlighting Kristine Johnson, an alumnus of the Master's program at the Mercatus Center, suggesting that the video will delve into her achievements, experiences, or contributions related to the center and the university. The design is clean and professional, emphasizing the academic and institutional context of the content.
